source: Hand-curated from arc-it.net 9.1 service-package pages. Flow names match the ARC-IT physical flow label.

flows.flow: TMC -> Roadway Signal Controller : signal control plan
TMC -> Roadway Signal Controller : signal coordination plan
Roadway Signal Controller -> TMC : signal system operational status
Roadway Signal Controller -> TMC : preemption activity
Vehicle/Pedestrian -> Roadway Signal Controller : vehicle detection
Emergency Vehicle / Rail -> Roadway Signal Controller : preemption request
Roadway Signal Controller -> Maintenance : signal fault data
TMC -> Roadway Signal Controller : signal timing update
TMC -> Roadway Equipment : traffic information
Roadway Equipment -> TMC : roadway equipment status
Roadway Equipment -> Maintenance : equipment maintenance status
Environmental Sensors -> TMC : road weather information
Environmental Sensors -> Maintenance : equipment maintenance status
TMC -> Roadway Equipment : traffic information
Roadway Equipment -> TMC : roadway equipment status
Roadway Equipment -> Maintenance : equipment maintenance status
Vehicle -> Roadside Equipment : signal request message
Roadside Equipment -> TMC : roadside equipment status
Roadside Equipment -> Maintenance : equipment maintenance status
Roadside Equipment -> Security Management : credential status
Roadside Equipment -> Security Management : security event
